item1.question: What services does khilonfast offer?

item2.question: How is service pricing determined?
item2.answer: khilonfast's service fees vary according to the service type and collaboration model. We have monthly fixed-fee (retainer) and project/product-based pricing options. You can contact us for detailed information.

faqs.question: Why should I choose to work with khilonfast?
faqs.answer: khilonfast stands out with its extensive digital marketing experience and data-driven approaches. It offers customized solutions for your business needs, continuously optimizes your campaigns, and works in a result-oriented manner. By working with khilonfast, you can ensure your brand gains a strong place in the digital field.

faqs.question: Why don't we do face-to-face or online meetings?
faqs.answer: khilonfast prefers digital communication tools to speed up processes and increase efficiency. All transactions are carried out through our site and email, allowing you to receive service quickly and effectively from anywhere in the world. By eliminating time-consuming synchronous meetings, khilonfast can scale its marketing service and prefers to focus its experience entirely on its expertise for better work. This way, you can work with a high-level agency at reasonable prices without wasting time.

faqs.question: Who should not work with khilonfast?
faqs.answer: khilonfast is ideal for firms that can manage digital processes effectively and adopt modern marketing tools. However, firms that prefer to find a person in front of them more than the quality of the work, feel safe only with a face-to-face meeting, are not good with metrics and analysis, cannot follow developments meaningfully, are distant from new generation marketing tools, do not regularly check communication tools like WhatsApp or email, are too busy to fill out the forms khilonfast will send, or say 'I know better than agencies, let's proceed with my own method' are not suitable customers for khilonfast.

faqs.question: Who is an ideal business partner for khilonfast?
faqs.answer: khilonfast is a perfect business partner for firms looking for fast, efficient, and result-oriented solutions in the digital world. It offers an ideal solution for firms that like taking data-driven decisions, can work with metrics, believe in the power of digital marketing, and are eager to use new generation tools. Additionally, firms that regularly use email and other digital communication tools, have the time and discipline to fill out the forms provided by khilonfast, and seek strategic guidance by trusting the expert team's suggestions get the highest efficiency while working with khilonfast.

faqs.question: How can I communicate with khilonfast?
faqs.answer: All communication with khilonfast is carried out through our user-friendly site and email. After purchasing the service, the necessary forms are sent to you through the system. After filling out these forms, the khilonfast team meticulously examines them, performs the necessary setups, and starts the operation. At every stage of the process, you are informed via email and all necessary support is provided.

faqs.question: How will the process proceed after purchasing the service?
faqs.answer: When you complete the service purchase through khilonfast, the forms you need to fill out are sent to you via our site. These forms collect the information needed for the correct configuration of the service. After the forms are filled out, the khilonfast team makes the necessary definitions and activates your service. Throughout the entire process, necessary information and instructions will be sent to you by email.

faqs.question: How are integrated digital marketing strategies beneficial for my business?
faqs.answer: Integrated digital marketing increases your marketing effectiveness by combining different digital channels under a single strategy. khilonfast integrates all your digital marketing efforts and ensures maximum interaction and conversion by using your budget in the most efficient way.

faqs.question: How can I track the performance of integrated digital marketing campaigns?
faqs.answer: khilonfast offers weekly, monthly, or three-month reports covering all your digital channels. These reports contain information about interaction rates, conversions, and other critical performance indicators. Additionally, you can monitor your campaigns instantly through live dashboards.

faqs.question: Why should I choose khilonfast integrated digital marketing service?
faqs.answer: khilonfast ensures maximum efficiency by integrating all your digital marketing efforts. Our expert team takes your digital strategy as a whole and ensures you present a consistent message and brand experience across all channels.

faqs.question: How is an integrated digital marketing strategy created?
faqs.answer: khilonfast first analyzes your business goals and existing digital assets. Then, it develops a strategy that integrates all your digital channels. After campaigns are launched, performance is regularly monitored and optimized.

approach.title: The Biggest Problems in Social Media Ads
approach.description: You are not the only company experiencing these problems. Solution: data-driven ad visual analysis.

roi.title: Low ROI
roi.subtitle: Problem: Budget is there, conversion is not

creative.title: Ineffective Visuals
creative.subtitle: Problem: Clicks are there, sales are not
creative.desc: Solution: Fix weak elements before going live with Heatmap + Focus/Engagement/Memory analysis.

tests.title: Unending Tests
tests.subtitle: Problem: A/B test load and cost
tests.desc: Solution: Narrow down the hypothesis with pre-analysis; get faster and low-cost results with fewer variants.

cmo.title: For CMOs
cmo.subtitle: Prove ROI Before Going Live
cmo.desc: Transform ROI pressure into provable data, accelerate team alignment, reduce pre-release risk.

growth.title: For Growth Marketers

growth.desc: Take action on the same day with fast analysis and ready-made suggestions in time/team constraints; reduce A/B load.

ceo.desc: Perform pre-flight control with clear action lists that reduce uncertainty and preserve a professional brand image.

features.title: Measure Your Creative Performance with 4 Scores
features.description: We score each element of your visuals according to the perception of the human eye.

focus.title: Focus
focus.desc: Shows how understandable the visual is. High score = clear and clean message.

cognitive.title: Cognitive Demand
cognitive.desc: Shows the level of complexity. A low score provides easier consumption and faster perception.

engagement.title: Engagement
engagement.desc: Interest and excitement prediction. A high score symbolizes the possibility of more interaction.

memory.title: Memory
memory.desc: Memorability. A high score increases the likelihood of the visual being remembered.

process.title: Analysis Process is Very Simple
process.description: Upload your visual and get your comprehensive report in minutes.

upload.title: Upload Your Visual
upload.desc: Drag and drop your sponsored post/post visual.

q4.a: Companies seeking fast, efficient, and results-focused growth; teams that value data-informed decisions and are open to modern marketing systems.

q5.q: How can I communicate with khilonfast?
q5.a: All communication is managed through our website and email. After purchase, required forms are shared, reviewed, and converted into operational setup and delivery.

q6.q: How does the process move forward after purchase?
q6.a: You complete onboarding forms, then the khilonfast team configures and activates your service. Performance reporting follows your selected cadence.

q7.q: How does a go-to-market strategy benefit my business?
q7.a: A go-to-market strategy enables faster, more effective launch performance for new offerings. khilonfast helps you define audience, positioning, and strategic actions that drive market traction.

q8.q: How can I track go-to-market performance?
q8.a: khilonfast provides weekly, monthly, or quarterly reporting across key metrics such as revenue impact, market penetration, and customer response, supported by dashboard visibility.

q9.q: Why should I choose khilonfast for go-to-market services?
q9.a: Our team builds data-driven launch strategies that deliver competitive clarity and faster execution. We prioritize measurable growth from day one.

q10.q: How is a go-to-market strategy created?
q10.a: We begin with audience and market analysis, design the strategic launch framework, execute with clear milestones, and optimize continuously based on performance signals.

pricing.title: 360 Integrated Digital Marketing Management
pricing.description: Cover all marketing needs from a single strategic hub and remove operational complexity.

core.desc: Take action and start building your digital presence immediately.
core.forWhoDesc: Designed for small businesses that want a strong, structured entry into digital marketing and better brand visibility.
core.whyDesc: Increase visibility through SEO, social media, and search advertising. Build a stronger digital footprint and launch with measurable confidence.

growth.desc: Increase digital performance and accelerate conversion impact.
growth.forWhoDesc: Ideal for mid-sized businesses aiming to scale and optimize digital strategy across customer acquisition and engagement.
growth.whyDesc: Optimize strategy for stronger conversions, better customer acquisition, and deeper audience engagement with data-led execution.

ultimate.desc: Lead the market and outperform competitors with intelligent strategy.
ultimate.forWhoDesc: A full-scale strategy for larger organizations seeking sustainable growth, continuous optimization, and clear competitive separation.
ultimate.whyDesc: Maximize conversion and engagement with advanced, data-driven strategy. Build long-term growth architecture and manage all channels under one system.

values.searchCore: Core Google Search Ads setup with foundational keyword research
values.searchUltimate: Pro Google Search Ads setup with advanced keyword research and ad copy creation
values.setupFeeDesc: For monthly packages, setup fee equals the first three months and applies only in month one.
values.setupFeeOnce: Setup fee equals the first month package fee and applies only once.
values.policyCore: If 10% of ad budget does not exceed the Core package fee, Core pricing applies. If exceeded, it upgrades to Growth.
values.policyGrowth: If 10% of ad budget does not exceed the Growth package fee, Growth pricing applies. If exceeded, it upgrades to Ultimate.
values.policyUltimate: If 10% of ad budget does not exceed the Ultimate package fee, Ultimate pricing applies. If exceeded, invoicing includes additional specialist cost and 10% ad budget rate over the Ultimate service fee. Pricing remains at the highest reached tier in following months.

comparison.note: (*) Excluding VAT. Excludes media budgets and third-party tool costs.
